evidence.regulatory_sentence: LSPs shall ensure that Key Fact Statement is provided before loan execution.
evidence.company_sentence: The borrower is informed of key terms at the time of sanction.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: Borrowers must be offered a cooling-off period to exit the digital loan.
evidence.company_sentence: Borrowers may prepay or foreclose as per product terms.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: Access to customer data shall be limited to need-to-know basis.
evidence.company_sentence: Access to customer data is restricted to authorized staff only.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: A grievance redressal officer shall be appointed and contact details disclosed.
evidence.company_sentence: We publish grievance officer contact details on our website.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: CDD must include verification of identity and address for all customers.
evidence.company_sentence: Identity verification is conducted for borrowers as per policy.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: Periodic KYC updates shall be performed based on customer risk category.
evidence.company_sentence: KYC is updated periodically for active borrowers.

evidence.regulatory_sentence: Records shall be retained for at least five years after closure.
evidence.company_sentence: Customer records are retained for a minimum of five years.
